description: User clicks the right arrow to advance the return date in the flight search results.
frame_description: The user is on a flight search results page and interacts with the date selection carousel at the top.

description: User pauses to examine the flight search results.
frame_description: Full view of flight results from Virgin Australia and Qantas.

description: User clicks the right arrow on the date picker again.
User navigates from the flight search page to Trello.
frame_description: The screen transitions to a white loading state with the Trello logo.

description: A 'Try Trello Premium' promotional popover appears in the sidebar.
frame_description: The Trello workspace sidebar is visible, and a promotional box for Trello Premium appears.

description: User hovers over the 'Start free trial' link in the Trello Premium popover, suggesting hesitation or interest.
frame_description: The cursor moves around the 'Start free trial' link within the promotional popover.

description: User navigates to the 'Japan' Trello board.
frame_description: The screen transitions to show a Trello board titled 'Japan' with various lists and cards.

description: User examines cards on the 'Japan' Trello board, focusing on the 'Fresh Seafood at Nijo Market' card.
interaction_target: Fresh Seafood at Nijo Market card
frame_description: The user is looking at travel planning cards on the Trello board.
